title: SAML 2.0 EntityDescriptor Metadata
description: Schema describing the JSON representation of a SAML 2.0 EntityDescriptor metadata element as defined in the OASIS SAML 2.0 Metadata specification (saml-metadata-2.0-os). Describes the entity's identity, supported roles, endpoints, and cryptographic keys.

entityID.description: The unique identifier for the SAML entity. MUST be a URI of no more than 1024 characters.

validUntil.description: The expiration time of the metadata. After this time, the metadata SHOULD be considered invalid.

cacheDuration.description: The maximum time the metadata consumer should cache the metadata, expressed as an XML duration (e.g., PT24H for 24 hours).

ID.description: An optional document-unique identifier for the element, used for XML signature references.

IDPSSODescriptor.title: IDPSSODescriptor
IDPSSODescriptor.description: Describes the SSO capabilities and endpoints of an Identity Provider as defined in SAML 2.0 Metadata Section 2.4.3.

protocolSupportEnumeration.description: The SAML protocol URIs supported by this role.

WantAuthnRequestsSigned.description: Indicates whether the Identity Provider requires that AuthnRequest messages be signed.

SingleSignOnService.description: The SSO endpoints supported by the Identity Provider.

SingleLogoutService.description: The Single Logout endpoints supported by the Identity Provider.

NameIDFormat.description: The NameID formats supported by the Identity Provider.

KeyDescriptor.description: Cryptographic keys used for signing and encryption.

SPSSODescriptor.title: SPSSODescriptor
SPSSODescriptor.description: Describes the SSO capabilities and endpoints of a Service Provider as defined in SAML 2.0 Metadata Section 2.4.4.

protocolSupportEnumeration.description: The SAML protocol URIs supported by this role.

AuthnRequestsSigned.description: Indicates whether AuthnRequest messages sent by this Service Provider are signed.

WantAssertionsSigned.description: Indicates whether the Service Provider requires that assertions be signed.

AssertionConsumerService.description: The Assertion Consumer Service endpoints where the IdP should send SAML Responses.

SingleLogoutService.description: The Single Logout endpoints supported by the Service Provider.

NameIDFormat.description: The NameID formats supported by the Service Provider.

KeyDescriptor.description: Cryptographic keys used for signing and encryption.

Endpoint.title: Endpoint
Endpoint.description: A SAML protocol endpoint with a binding and location.

Binding.description: The SAML binding URI for this endpoint.

Location.description: The URI where messages should be sent.

ResponseLocation.description: An optional URI where response messages should be sent, if different from Location.

IndexedEndpoint.title: IndexedEndpoint
IndexedEndpoint.description: An endpoint with an index and optional default designation, used for ACS endpoints.

Binding.description: The SAML binding URI for this endpoint.

Location.description: The URI where messages should be sent.

index.description: A non-negative integer index for this endpoint.

isDefault.description: Indicates whether this is the default endpoint when no index is specified.

KeyDescriptor.title: KeyDescriptor
KeyDescriptor.description: Describes a cryptographic key used for signing or encryption.

use.description: The purpose of the key: signing or encryption.

KeyInfo.description: The key information containing the X.509 certificate or other key material.

Organization.title: Organization
Organization.description: Information about the organization responsible for the SAML entity.

OrganizationName.description: The human-readable name of the organization.

OrganizationDisplayName.description: The display name of the organization for user interfaces.

OrganizationURL.description: A URL for more information about the organization.

ContactPerson.title: ContactPerson
ContactPerson.description: Contact information for a person associated with the SAML entity.

GivenName.description: The given name of the contact person.

SurName.description: The surname of the contact person.

EmailAddress.description: The email address of the contact person.
